name: Claude Prompt
description: Runs a prompt through the Claude CLI (`claude -p`). Uses the user's logged-in subscription — no API key needed. The response is captured and passed downstream.

allowed_tools.description: Optional list of tool names to allow, e.g. ["WebSearch","Read"]. Passed to --allowedTools.

output_format.description: `json` (default) or `text`. When `json`, the `result` field of the CLI output becomes the response.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Optional upstream value interpolated into the prompt via {{input.context}}.
